---
title: ""
number-sections: false
numbered: false
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    toc: false
  pdf:
    title-block-style: none
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\small\textbf{Palabras clave:} Market justice preferences; Education; Meritocratic beliefs; Cross-country; Macrostructural factors
\normalsize
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<style>
nav#TOC { display: none !important; }
div[data-when-format="pdf"] { display: none !important; }
</style>
<span class="keywords-line"><strong>Palabras clave: Market justice preferences; Education; Meritocratic beliefs; Cross-country; Macrostructural factors</strong> </span>
:::

# Abstract {.unnumbered}
